title: BareBones Kompotik Edition
description: Modpack based on BareBones Resource Pack and made to feel even more immersed with shaders and cosmetic mods that have been tweaked.
body:
![1.21.4 Supported!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bff94e7539054915058ca8107014b87327f9c5f.png)
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f49ebd5b6f3f0400700b4217194d899b04074aa2.png)
### **This modpack is my Personal Take with making most Trailer-ish look for minecraft.**
Of course it is based on amazing BareBones Texture pack.
And directly Inspired by YouTuber [lowresbones](https://www.youtube.com/@lowresbones)
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f49ebd5b6f3f0400700b4217194d899b04074aa2.png)
**This modpack uses mix of insanely good BSL shader settings, animation, QOL and optimization improvements.** Such as:
- Clean animations with FreshAnimation ResourcePack
- Stunning Weather that you DON'T want to skip with Paritcle Rain
- Amazing Details with Particular
- Lot's of different Player Animations with multiple mods
- Everything tweaked and PlayTested to it's fullest.


![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f49ebd5b6f3f0400700b4217194d899b04074aa2.png)
